text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black decides not to run in the Japanese
Derby and simply observes it. There, she
witnesses Brusquement's record-breaking victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon seeing Brusquement's powerful final
acceleration, Kitasan Black is struck by a chilling
realization that the moment you exhaust your
stamina is the moment you lose in medium and
long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she has no affinity for long-distance races, then
the 3,000-meter fall Kikuka Sho will be a
nightmare. A new problem has reared its ugly
head.
